mapper.insert: INSERT INTO balance_change_log ( merchant_user_id, currency, biz_type, biz_no, change_amount, before_available, after_available, created_at ) VALUES ( #{merchantUserId}, #{currency}, #{bizType}, #{bizNo}, #{changeAmount}, #{beforeAvailable}, #{afterAvailable}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (biz_type, biz_no) DO NOTHING
